6. Commissioner, Divyang Welfare, Pune No. Letter dated 1797162, 20.03.2026.
The memo: -

Reference No. 1 to the prescribed procedure to be followed before payment of salaries and non-salaried dues of teachers / non-teaching staff in Special Non-Government Schools / Workshops for Persons with Disabilities. 1 dated 13th September, 2022
The directions have been issued by the Government Circular No. 2 as prescribed under the letter dated 27th September, 2023 hereunder.
Instructions have been issued to scrutinize and submit proposals as per the scrutiny list done.
Central Government has revised the pay scale for Government employees with effect from 01.01.2016 (Seventh Pay Scale).
Commission) has decided to implement. Accordingly, full-time in government schools with state government employees.
The Maharashtra Civil Services (Revised Pay) Rules, 2019 regarding the implementation of pay structure for teaching and non-teaching staff.

It has been notified vide Government Notification dated 30th January, 2019. Further details regarding fixation of starting salary and payment of arrears as per Government circular dated 20.02.2019 of the Department of Finance.
The procedure has been prescribed. Accordingly, the then Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance dated 23

Residential / Non-Residential Special Schools / Workshops for Non-Governmental Organizations with Government Approved and Aided Disabilities run by NGOs in the State under the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities as per Government Decision dated April, 2021
Full-time teaching and non-teaching staff of MATIMAND CHILD HOUSES with effect from 1st January, 2016.
The revised pay structure of the Commission has been approved.

Also, the additional expenditure arising out of the revised pay structure implemented under this order is to be incurred on the salaries and allowances of teachers and non-teaching staff under the same head of account for which the expenditure is incurred.
The directions have been issued under the said Government Decision.
